hero.title: Crafting Comfort for Every Home
hero.subtitle: Discover Our Journey and Passion for Furniture Design

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 2010, Comforty started with a simple idea: that high-quality, beautifully designed furniture should be accessible to everyone. What began as a small workshop has grown into a leading furniture retailer, serving customers across the region.
story.p2: We believe that your home is your sanctuary. Our team of skilled designers and craftsmen are dedicated to creating pieces that blend comfort, style, and durability, turning your space into a reflection of your personality.

values.title: Our Values
values.v1_desc: We select the finest materials to ensure our furniture lasts for generations.
values.v2_desc: Our designs blend classic elegance with modern functionality.
values.v3_desc: Your satisfaction is our priority, from shopping to white-glove delivery.
